### Highlights | 更新内容

- 重构了 macOS 客户端的本地音频播放链路。默认模式现在使用新的 `Core Audio / AudioUnit` 直连播放路径，减少额外缓冲与搬运开销，让多通道音频在本地输出时更稳；同时内部继续保留兼容回退路径，设备差异场景下也能更平滑地恢复播放。
  Reworked the macOS client's local audio playback pipeline. The default mode now uses a newer `Core Audio / AudioUnit` direct playback path that cuts down extra buffering and copying, making multi-channel local output steadier, while an internal compatibility fallback remains available for smoother recovery on devices that need it.
- 新增 `音效增强` 模式，面向耳机与 `2.0 / 2.1` 音箱提供客户端侧音效处理。现在可以在设置页切换聆听设备、调整空间感、音场宽度、混响和均衡器，并使用更适合游戏、对白或低频取向的预设。
  Added a new `Audio Enhancement` mode for headphones and `2.0 / 2.1` speakers with client-side audio processing. You can now switch listening-device targets in Settings, adjust spatial feel, soundstage width, reverb, and EQ, and choose presets tuned for gaming, clearer dialogue, or stronger low end.
- 提升了 Sunshine Foundation 音频协商与播放兼容性，补强了 `5.1 / 7.1 / 7.1.4 (12ch)` 多通道接收与本地播放链路，让高声道布局在 macOS 客户端上的接入能力更完整。
  Improved Sunshine Foundation audio negotiation and playback compatibility, strengthening the receive and local playback path for `5.1 / 7.1 / 7.1.4 (12ch)` layouts so higher-channel streams are handled more completely on the macOS client.
- 音频设置页也同步做了整理：音效模式、聆听设备、预设、混响与均衡器等控制项更集中，切换路径更清晰，方便快速在“直出保真”和“本地增强”之间选择适合自己的听感。
  The audio settings page has been reorganized as well. Sound mode, listening device, presets, reverb, and EQ controls are now grouped more clearly, making it easier to move between direct playback and locally enhanced listening.

### Maintenance | 维护更新

- README 首页结构已整理为更短的核心特性入口，并把视音频、输入控制和连接稳定性说明拆到后续章节，方便新用户先快速了解能力，再按需查看细节。
  The README homepage has been reshaped into a shorter core-capabilities overview, with audio/video, input, and connectivity details moved into later sections so new users can scan the project first and dive deeper only when needed.
- 版本号已更新到 `1.3.6`，并补充了这一版的专用 release notes，方便后续按既有发布流程生成 GitHub Release 页面内容。
  The marketing version has been updated to `1.3.6`, and this release now includes dedicated curated release notes so the existing GitHub Release workflow can generate the release page content cleanly.
